title: World Cup of Darts: Luke Littler and Luke Humphries power England to sixth World title
description: England win the World Cup of Darts for a record-extending sixth time as Luke Littler and Luke Humphries overcome the Netherlands 10-5 in Frankfurt.
content:
England won the World Cup of Darts for a record-extending sixth time as Luke Littler and Luke Humphries overcame the Netherlands 10-5 in Frankfurt.
The top seeds defeated Wales and Scotland earlier on Sunday to set up a tantalising best-of-19-legs fi... [2117 chars]

title: Assisted dying returns to parliament as MP urges peers to 'finish the job'
description: Lauren Edwards says she will bring the exact same bill which was narrowly passed by the Commons but ran out of time in the Lords.
content:
A fresh attempt to legalise assisted dying in England and Wales has been launched, with the MP behind the plan telling the BBC she wanted to "finish the job".

title: Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix: Lewis Hamilton's first Ferrari win a statement to himself and the rest of F1
description: Lewis Hamilton's win in Barcelona was a moment of redemption after a first season at Ferrari that left him questioning himself, and others questioning him.
content:
Lewis Hamilton's historic first victory for Ferrari in the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix was a statement to himself as well as to the rest of Formula 1, and the watching world.

title: Germany vs Curacao LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group E score, commentary, updates & stats
description: Listen to BBC Radio 5 Live commentary, follow text and score updates and track the latest match stats as Germany take on Curaçao in a 2026 FIFA World Cup Group E match at Houston Stadium in the United States.
content:
Four-time winners Germany overcame a brief scare from World Cup debutants Curacao before turning on the style to win their Group E opener in Houston.

title: Emma Raducanu falls short in Queen's final but feels positive about Wimbledon
description: Emma Raducanu falls agonisingly short at Queen's after losing in Sunday's final - but there are huge positives to take with Wimbledon just around the corner.
content:
For the first time this week, Emma Raducanu sat on her chair and looked forlorn.
